Question: How many songs are on Spotify?
Reponse: Spotify currently holds 100 million songs in its library, with 60,000 added every day

Question: Who is the most streamed artist on Spotify?
Reponse: Drake is the most streamed artist, with more than 40 billion lifetime plays (ChartMasters)

Question: What is the most streamed song on Spotify?
Reponse: Ed Sheeran’s Shape of You holds the top spot at 4.3 billion plays (full list)

Question: How many countries is Spotify available in?
Reponse: Spotify is currently available in 171 markets

Question: How many Spotify users access the app once a day?
Reponse: 44% of users listen to Spotify on a daily basis (GoodwaterCapital)

Question: How many podcasts are on Spotify?
Reponse: Spotify currently holds five million podcasts in its library

Question: How much does Spotify pay an artist per stream?
Reponse: Estimates vary on how much a Spotify stream is worth to artist: from $0.006-0.0084 to as low as $0.00318 per stream (The Verge/Soundcharts)

Question: How much has Spotify paid out to rights holders since launch?
Reponse: Spotify claims it has paid €21 billion to rights holders
